title: Gaslighting
author: Samantha Parker
subline: Recognize manipulative and emotionally abusive people — and break free.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A gas streetlight: a single lamp post with a lamp head. The lamp's light is rendered as a small red halo (the 'gas' that manipulates your reality). The post is in ash, the lamp's glow is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- Lamp post -->
    <line x1="0" y1="300" x2="0" y2="-100" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3"/>
    <line x1="-60" y1="-100" x2="60" y2="-100" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- Lamp head (triangular) -->
    <path d="M -80 -100 L 0 -240 L 80 -100 Z" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none"/>
    <!-- Lamp glow: a small red disc + 4 expanding circles -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="-100" r="14" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="-100" r="40" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="-100" r="80" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.3"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="-100" r="140" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.18"/>
    <!-- Light beams radiating downward -->
    <g stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4">
      <line x1="0" y1="-100" x2="-200" y2="300"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-100" x2="-100" y2="300"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-100" x2="0" y2="300"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-100" x2="100" y2="300"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-100" x2="200" y2="300"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Foundation rule -->
    <line x1="-100" y1="300" x2="100" y2="300" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>
  <text x="800" y="2200" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">WHEN THE LAMP IS RED, THE STREET IS NOT SAFE</text>
</svg>
rationale: A single gas streetlight: ash lamp post, ash triangular lamp head, with a red 14px filled disc as the lit flame and 4 expanding red circles as the glow. Five faint red light beams radiate downward. The composition is a literal 'gas' streetlight that lights the wrong things. Title 420px uppercase, single word 'GASLIGHTING', weight 500.
